title: Former Great Detective Nagumo Keiichiro / Mashiro's Pest Extermination
overview: Nagumo Keiichiro was once a great child detective, but age is starting to catch up with him.

title: With Ghosts, Go for the Knees / Find the Real Thief! / Three Minutes Until Mashiro Explodes
overview: Mashiro's schoolmate seeks the agency's help in catching a ghost, and Nagumo is suspected of underwear theft.

title: Great Detective Asunaro / The Ones Who Don't Realize They're Stalkers Are the Most Dangerous
overview: A young detective lockpicks his way into Nagumo's office and asks to work for him.

title: Murder at the Mansion of Screams / Maki-chan and the Generation Gap
overview: Nagumo is invited to a dinner party at a stately old mansion... where a mass murder once took place.

title: Welcome to the World of Grown-Ups / A Midsummer Thriller / Mashiro and the Agent from the Stars
overview: Nagumo takes Mashiro to his favorite bar to give her a taste of grown-up society.

title: Mashiro Hosts Girls' Night Out / Assistant Switch!! / Battle to the Death at 100° Celsius
overview: Mashiro spends an evening with Azuha and Maki. Later, Nagumo and Asunaro switch partners.

title: Nagumo-san's Grown-Up Allure / The Lost Child and Mashiro / The Great Detective vs. Phantom Thief Riverfake
overview: Mashiro brings back a lost little girl... and finds out there's more to her than meets the eye.

title: Nagumo's Cyber Case File / The Phantom Thief's Method / A Detective Assistant's Day Off
overview: The gang tries to sniff out a cyber criminal who's brainwashing people through online videos.

title: Take Good Care of Your Smartphone / Maki-chan and Asunaro
overview: Mashiro loses her smartphone, and Asunaro recounts how he and Maki became partners.

title: Catch the Sneak Photographer! / The Bullet Bride
overview: Nagumo receives a case of someone taking indecent photos of women at a water park.

title: Mashiro and the Psychic of Love
overview: A client asks Nagumo to save his wife from a psychic who seems to have brainwashed his village.

title: Nagumo Dons the Haori / Producing Nagumo Detective Agency / Nagumo Detective Agency Shuts Down
overview: Can the gang make enough money to pay off Nagumo's overdue rent and save Nagumo Detective Agency?
